overall.description: First-person driving sequence through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit traditional Asian architecture mixed with futuristic elements. The vehicle navigates from covered market streets through coastal highways and urban tunnels, showcasing the atmospheric world of Cyberpunk 2077.

hanging paper lanterns illuminating the covered walkway
large illuminated sign with Japanese characters reading HOTEL
overhead covered structure sheltering the street from rain
small vendor stalls lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle moves through a narrow covered market street featuring traditional Asian architecture mixed with cyberpunk neon elements. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while a large neon hotel sign glows in the distance. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights, and a few pedestrians walk along the sheltered sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated coastal highway with ocean view

events.description: exits covered market street onto elevated coastal highway with ocean view visible on left

agents.ego_description: driving along elevated coastal road with view of ocean on left side, navigating gentle curves

metal safety barrier separating road from ocean drop

floating digital billboard displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to an elevated coastal highway with the ocean visible on the left beyond metal guardrails. The rain continues to fall heavily as the vehicle navigates the curved road. A holographic advertisement floats on the right while a distant bridge looms in the foggy background.

events.description: approaching tunnel entrance as buildings close in on both sides
entering underpass tunnel with artificial lighting replacing ambient neon

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the open coastal road into a denser urban environment with tall concrete buildings. The driver approaches and enters a tunnel underpass where the lighting shifts to artificial sources. Graffiti covers the concrete walls as the vehicle moves through the covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with graffiti murals and parked vehicles

white sedan crosses the intersection ahead from left to right

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the vehicle enters an open plaza featuring a prominent NO REGRETS graffiti mural on the right. The space is mostly empty with a few parked vehicles and traffic cones visible. A white sedan crosses the intersection ahead as the vehicle continues through the rain-soaked streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and active traffic

approaching slower traffic and navigating through vehicles ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment features driving through a busy commercial district with prominent neon signage including Lizzie Bar. The vehicle navigates around concrete barriers and other traffic while pedestrians with umbrellas wait at crosswalks. Overhead structures and dense cyberpunk architecture line both sides of the wet street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a sheltered neon marketplace into an open coastal highway and finally into a gritty urban underpass. It begins by gliding through a narrow covered street where red paper lanterns and glowing hotel signs reflect off the wet asphalt. As the vehicle emerges from the market, the scene opens up onto an elevated coastal road where heavy rain falls beside the ocean and a holographic advertisement floats against a foggy backdrop. The environment then shifts from the open coastline toward a denser urban landscape of towering concrete buildings before the camera enters a dark tunnel. The shot concludes as the lighting turns artificial, moving past graffiti-covered walls within the enclosed underpass.

The shot follows a continuous drive from a stark, open plaza into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a commercial district. It begins as the vehicle emerges from a tunnel into a rain-soaked open space, passing a prominent NO REGRETS graffiti mural and a few scattered traffic cones. As the vehicle crosses an intersection behind a white sedan, the sparse environment gradually gives way to a more crowded urban landscape. The scene then shifts into a busy commercial corridor where the open sky is replaced by overhead structures and towering cyberpunk architecture. Finally, the camera navigates around concrete barriers and pedestrians with umbrellas, moving deeper into the glow of vibrant neon signage and the Lizzie Bar.
